title: tragia furialis var. scheffleri
intro: Tragia furialis var. scheffleri, also known as the spurge family plant, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its roots and leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Tragia furialis var. scheffleri include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections. Traditionally, it has been used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which are often used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
